name: Left Democratic Front
description: Left-wing alliance led by CPI(M), dominant from 1980 onwards

name: United Democratic Front
description: Centre alliance led by INC, alternates power with LDF

name: National Democratic Alliance
description: Right-wing alliance led by BJP, marginal presence in Kerala

name: Pre-alliance era
description: Governments formed before the LDF/UDF alliance system crystallised (pre-1980)
